mapper.select: SELECT a.id, a.user_id, a.type, a.content, a.target_id, a.target_type, a.create_time, u.nickname as user_name, u.avatar as user_avatar FROM sys_user_activity a LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON a.user_id = u.id WHERE a.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user_activity (user_id, type, content, target_id, target_type, create_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{type}, #{content}, #{targetId}, #{targetType}, #{createTime})
